SCOAS Execution Report - ocvn

Timestamp: 2026-01-29-11-30

Summary

1020
Rule Violations
5.31
Average Violations/Route
0
Routes Without Violations
192
Routes Analyzed
864
Responses Analyzed
If your OpenAPI Specification file contains status code misuses, they should be fixed based on the rule descriptions that are provided. The rule sources provide references to the standards (RFCs) that were used to define the rules.

Details

  • 192 violations of the rule no-401-if-no-auth
  • 166 violations of the rule has-400-if-params
  • 166 violations of the rule has-422-if-params
  • 112 violations of the rule has-204-if-no-content
  • 96 violations of the rule has-400-if-payload
  • 96 violations of the rule has-413-if-content-length
  • 96 violations of the rule has-415-if-content-type
  • 96 violations of the rule has-422-if-payload

Violation #1

Route: GET /api/averageAwardPeriod

Responses: 200 OK, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found

Parameters: year (query), month (query), monthly (query), bidTypeId (query), notBidTypeId (query), procuringEntityId (query), notProcuringEntityId (query), supplierId (query), bidSelectionMethod (query), notBidSelectionMethod (query), contrMethod (query), tenderLoc (query), minTenderValue (query), maxTenderValue (query), minAwardValue (query), maxAwardValue (query), procuringEntityCityId (query), procuringEntityDepartmentId (query), procuringEntityGroupId (query), pageNumber (query), pageSize (query)

Rule ID: has-400-if-params

Rule Description: Always implement a response with the status code 400 Bad Request if the method contains parameters (in case of invalid syntax).

Rule Sources: RFC 9110, Section 15.5.1 (400 Bad Request)

Violation #2

Route: GET /api/averageAwardPeriod

Responses: 200 OK, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found

Parameters: year (query), month (query), monthly (query), bidTypeId (query), notBidTypeId (query), procuringEntityId (query), notProcuringEntityId (query), supplierId (query), bidSelectionMethod (query), notBidSelectionMethod (query), contrMethod (query), tenderLoc (query), minTenderValue (query), maxTenderValue (query), minAwardValue (query), maxAwardValue (query), procuringEntityCityId (query), procuringEntityDepartmentId (query), procuringEntityGroupId (query), pageNumber (query), pageSize (query)

Rule ID: has-422-if-params

Rule Description: Always implement a response with the status code 422 Unprocessable Content if the method contains parameters (in case of invalid semantics).

Rule Sources: RFC 9110, Section 15.5.21 (422 Unprocessable Content)

Violation #3

Route: GET /api/averageAwardPeriod

Responses: 200 OK, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found

Rule ID: no-401-if-no-auth

Rule Description: Never implement a response with the status code 401 Unauthorized if the specification does not contains an authentication mechanism.

Rule Sources: RFC 9110, Section 15.5.2 (401 Unauthorized)

Violation #4

Route: POST /api/averageAwardPeriod

Responses: 200 OK, 201 Created, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found

Parameters: year (query), month (query), monthly (query), bidTypeId (query), notBidTypeId (query), procuringEntityId (query), notProcuringEntityId (query), supplierId (query), bidSelectionMethod (query), notBidSelectionMethod (query), contrMethod (query), tenderLoc (query), minTenderValue (query), maxTenderValue (query), minAwardValue (query), maxAwardValue (query), procuringEntityCityId (query), procuringEntityDepartmentId (query), procuringEntityGroupId (query), pageNumber (query), pageSize (query)

Rule ID: has-204-if-no-content

Rule Description: Always implement a response with the status code 204 No Content if a response in the 2xx Successful range does not have content.

Rule Sources: RFC 9110, Section 15.3.5 (204 No Content) | RFC 9110, Section 15.3 (Successful 2xx)

Responses: 200 OK, 401 Unauthorized, 403 Forbidden, 404 Not Found

Parameters: year (query), month (query), monthly (query), bidTypeId (query), notBidTypeId (query), procuringEntityId (query), notProcuringEntityId (query), supplierId (query), bidSelectionMethod (query), notBidSelectionMethod (query), contrMethod (query), tenderLoc (query), minTenderValue (query), maxTenderValue (query), minAwardValue (query), maxAwardValue (query), procuringEntityCityId (query), procuringEntityDepartmentId (query), procuringEntityGroupId (query), pageNumber (query), pageSize (query)

Rule ID: has-422-if-params

Rule Description: Always implement a response with the status code 422 Unprocessable Content if the method contains parameters (in case of invalid semantics).

Rule Sources: RFC 9110, Section 15.5.21 (422 Unprocessable Content)

Route: GET /api/totalCancelledTendersByYearByRationale

Rule ID: no-401-if-no-auth

Rule Description: Never implement a response with the status code 401 Unauthorized if the specification does not contains an authentication mechanism.

Rule Description: Always implement a response with the status code 204 No Content if a response in the 2xx Successful range does not have content.

Rule Sources: RFC 9110, Section 15.3.5 (204 No Content) | RFC 9110, Section 15.3 (Successful 2xx)
